title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Integration of vk calls into external products.

title: Software Engineer / Product Owner
description: Developing the frontend part and a DSL-translator of platform Way4.
Ensuring a required level of test coverage, quality of code, release notes.
Maintaining PA DSS/PCI DSS requirements and high level of security.
responsibilities: Supports product development according to the Roadmap.
Product quality assurance, including: monitoring the quality of code;
Ensuring a required level of test coverage, high quality Release Notes.
developing software to facilitate manual/automated product testing
applying current and reliable software development technologies (for developing products)
Controlling usage of 3rd party libraries in terms of absense of known security vulnerabilities and ensuring license compliance.
Ensures implementation of non-functional requirements for the product.
Performing the functions of the Information Security Officer (PCI DSS).

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Developed high-performance real-time billing platform for sms messaging.
Integrated a platform with external and internal systems.
responsibilities: Architecture development and writing server-side and client-side parts of the platform according to the external customers’ requirements.
Implementation of applications for data synchronization via REST, SOAP, SMTP.
Configuration and optimization of web servers.

title: Monitoring System Administrator
description: Monitoring and optimization of the services performance.
Participation in the elimination of emergencies in the services.
Improvement of existing emergency response processes.
responsibilities: Monitoring and optimization of the services performance.
Participation in the elimination of emergencies in the services.
Improvement of existing emergency response processes.
functions: Setting up a monitoring system to display the necessary information for technical support staff and specialists responsible for the respective systems.
Supporting uninterrupted operation of the monitoring system.
Performing tasks on maintaining company’s services in operation.
Eliminating errors in the company's systems.
Providing technical recommendations to internal divisions of the company.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Configuration, monitoring and troubleshooting hosting and client services.
functions: Debugging and analysis of application traffic in the interaction of the main protocols (DNS, FTP, SSH, POP3, SMTP, HTTP).
Configuration and monitoring of the Linux/FreeBSD operating system group, configuration and monitoring of services (Apache, Nginx, MySQL, exim/postfix).
Work on the bash, vi command line with the main GNU utilities.
Administration of web servers and organization of websites.
Competent written and oral communication with clients, ability to formulate the thoughts and deliver them in a clear way to the interlocutor.

title: Hardware System Administrator
description: Troubleshooting hardware and software on self-service terminals.
